title: Thermal Skies
description: Allows Thermal Expansion blocks to interact on VS ships
body:
This mod simply uses mixins to allow players to use Thermal Expansion/Series blocks on Valkyrien Skies ships.

Without out it (as of its release date) the screen of a machine will appear for a few frames then dissapear, as there is a hard coded distance restriction. In this mod we get around said restriction by replacing the distance checking call with a safe alternative from VS, such that ships are included in range calculations

Eventually this mod may additionally offer control of VS ships using thermal expansion, it does not currently, however.
